records.ety: [Cf. F. anastomoser, fr. anastomose. See Anastomosis.]
records.morph: [imp. & p. p. Anastomozed (<?/); p. pr. & vb. n. Anastomosing.]

defs: To inosculate; to intercommunicate by anastomosis, as the arteries and veins.
quotes: The ribbing of the leaf, and the anastomosing network of its vessels.

defs: Of any channels or lines, to meet and unite or run into each other, as rivers; to coalesce; to interjoin.
